description: Sleeveless top with inner camisolePrinted blue sleeveless top made of sheer, woven 100% polyester, has a smocked neck, ruffle detail over the arm holes, buttoned placket up to the midriff, pin-tucks on the chest and an elasticated hem. Comes with a spaghetti top with adjustable shoulder straps. FitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, jeans and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
